hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qiE 'rm[[:space:]]+-[rRfF]*r[rRfF]*|git[[:space:]]+reset[[:space:]]+--hard|git[[:space:]]+push[[:space:]]+(--force|-f)|git[[:space:]]+clean[[:space:]]+-[fd]|git[[:space:]]+branch[[:space:]]+-D|DROP[[:space:]]+(TABLE|DATABASE)|TRUNCATE[[:space:]]+TABLE'; then echo "{\"continue\": false, \"stopReason\": \"Destructive command blocked: $cmd — confirm manually before proceeding.\"}"; fi
